text: Glamour and sophistication.
Here is my take on Kate Middleton's Chelsea Blow Dry.
For this look you will need a heat protectant, taming serum, round brush or any brush, hair
dryer, Velcro rollers and clips, hair dryer hood from Sleepin' Rollers.
This look comes out most effective with freshly washed, clean hair.
Apply heat protectant of your choice and blow dry your hair until it's 80% dry.
Use the largest sized Velcro rollers for the crown of your head and secure it with a clip.
Keep on rolling in the same direction downwards until you reach your neck.
Oh look, it's a roller mohawk.
Now onto the sides.
Make sure you are rolling in a downward direction and that the curl is tight and secure.
A good rolling technique will result in amazing curls.
Alright, now grab that hair dryer hood and attach the tail to the nozzle of your hair
dryer.
Stick this fabulous hood over your head and look how amazing that looks.
I'm just kidding of course.
Set the dryer to the lowest heat setting and the lowest blow dry strength and blow dry
your hair for 20 minutes until your hair is completely dry.
After 20 minutes, turn off the dryer and remove this wonderful looking pink hood.
What do you guys think?
Could this hood be the new trend?
Joking.
Unravel the rollers by putting your finger through the center of the roller.
Make sure you twist the hair with your finger to really bring out the curl.
Tame flyaways with serum and set with hairspray.
And your Kate Middleton look is complete.
I hope you guys enjoyed the video and let me know what you think of the look and if
you have any questions.
I'll see you guys next week.
Bye.
